title: cross_engine r10 deeper integration plan — cross_engine corpus deeper SHA + load-bearing meta-axis import into hexa_sim atlas vocabulary
trigger: F126-F132 cross-engine integration covers 1 cross_engine file SHA only (design/cross_engine/r10_m10_coupling_dossier.md @ F131); cross_engine system corpus also includes ordinal_separation_audit.md (235 lines, ω·2 audit verdict PASS-WARN) + 2026-04-26_axis_deepening_meta_audit.md (132 lines, ω·3 third-level audit verdict WARN). r10_deeper companion to m3_deeper (F154-F160) / m5_deeper (F161-F167 reserved) / r4_deeper. r10 corpus is SMALLER than m3/m5/r4 (3 dossiers vs 5-8 ω-cycles each) → fewer candidates by honest count.

cross_engine_source_artifacts.role: r10/m10 bidirectional bus dossier (235 lines, 9 sections — topology + bus protocol + thresholds + ordinal separation sketch + self-cert avoidance + falsifier + oscillation mitigation + LoC budget)
ω·2 audit (181 lines, 6 sections — ε_0 vs Γ_0 non-triviality + shared theorem citation cross-claim check + bus protocol audit + verdict PASS-WARN + falsifier-of-the-audit)

ω·3 third-level audit (132 lines, 8 sections — tree of ω-cycles + ordinal monotonicity + theorem citation map + falsifier inventory + LoC totaling + convergence signals + verdict WARN + 3 next-step recs)

cross_engine_invariants_identified: I1 self_cert_avoidance_writer_guard — neither engine emits a row asserting OTHER engine's consistency/soundness/termination; writer-side guard `assert payload.get('target_engine', source) == source` (dossier §5 + §6 + audit §3-§4, theorem: Löb 1955 + Gödel 2nd 1931)

I2 ordinal_separation_epsilon0_lt_gamma0 — roadmap proof-theoretic strength bounded by ε_0 (Gentzen 1936); meta requires Γ_0 (Feferman-Schütte 1964); ε_0 = φ_1(0) < … < Γ_0 textbook-verifiable in Veblen hierarchy; joint ψ(Ω_ω) declared ceiling not derived (audit §2)
I3 bus_append_only_jsonl_fsync_per_row — state/cross_engine_bus.jsonl append-only line-delimited JSON, fsync after write, schema-extensions append-only per raw 77 (dossier §2)

I4 rate_limit_5s_per_source_oscillation_floor — at most 1 cross-bus event per 5s wall-clock per source; combined with hysteresis (0.1 fire / 0.05 release) + round_quantum_floor T_meta_round_quantum ≥ 5s + cycle_detector (3+3 alternating in 60s) bounds oscillation < 0.2 Hz per direction (dossier §7)

I5 inward_facing_theorem_citations_only — Gödel 2nd / K-uncomputable / halting theorems cited as inward-facing self-limits never as outward-facing claims about other engine; 3-pair audit (r19↔m12, r14↔m16, r12↔m15) verified disjoint Gödel universes (audit §3)
I6 disjoint_godel_universes_no_bew_predicate_crosses_bus — bus carries only data payloads never proof terms; no derivation rule references other engine's Bew_T(·) (dossier §4 step 3)

I7 audit_verdict_pass_warn_with_4_warns — ω·3 audit identifies 4 WARN dimensions (12 unwritten deepening cycles + m3 LoC overrun unflagged + parent ω-cycles missing ordinal_stamp+falsifier fields + 10/22 singleton theorems); structural skeleton consistent across 6 files; no FAIL (deepening §7)

candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_A_schema_field_S_entries: cross_engine bus row schema {ts, source, event_type, payload} → @S structure entries. Verdict: REJECTED — schema is 4 fields only and well-known; @S entries duplicate dossier §2 without verifier leverage; no JSON Schema file exists yet (bus is design-stage per audit §4 caveat).
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_B_invariant_M_meta_entries: cross_engine load-bearing invariants → @M meta-axis entries analog to F132. Each invariant becomes one @M entry in NEW shard atlas.append.cross-engine-r10-deeper-2026-04-26.n6 with grep-based falsifier. Verdict: SELECTED for I1 (self_cert_avoidance writer guard, load-bearing) + I2 (ordinal separation ε_0 < Γ_0, the textbook-verifiable non-triviality claim).
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_C_phase_T_trace_entries: cross_engine source files → @T trace entries (verify each by SHA). 2 uncovered: ordinal_separation_audit (8467ef049484) + axis_deepening_meta_audit (ba9b8900bd9c). Verdict: SELECTED — covers 2 cross_engine source files not in F131.
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.chosen: B + C combination — 2 @T file-SHA entries (covering remaining cross_engine corpus) + 2 @M meta-axis entries (I1 self-cert avoidance + I2 ordinal separation). Total 4 atlas entries (smaller than F154-F160 7-entry m3 cadence — honest reflection of smaller cross_engine surface). Other I-invariants (I3..I7) deferred to Tier-2: I3/I4 require bus runtime artifact (not yet on disk per audit §4 caveat); I5/I6 are derivative of I1 (self-cert avoidance enforces them); I7 is audit-verdict metadata not load-bearing system invariant.

tier_2_backlog_invariants.blocker: state/cross_engine_bus.jsonl absent (bus runtime not yet shipped per audit §4 caveat); F175 SHA-anchors design dossier §2 specification but runtime check needs first-emitted bus row + line-count monotonicity test
